queries.question: Empirical analysis of how shorter loan duration in months acts as a determinant of default by mitigating credit risk drivers and lowering default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Statistical impact of higher credit amounts requested by applicants on credit default probability and their role as a primary credit risk driver.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Determinants of default analysis examining the relationship between the absence of a known savings account and credit default probability, focusing on its capacity to decrease credit risk drivers.
